chapter_title.en: Prayer of the Sick, the Unconcious, the Weak and the Infirm, the Elderly and Others

text: 1058 - وَقَالَ لَهُ أَبُو بَصِيرٍ: أَسْمَعُ اَلْعَطْسَةَ فَأَحْمَدُ اَللَّهَ تَعَالَى وَ أُصَلِّي عَلَى اَلنَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ وَ أَنَا فِي اَلصَّلاَةِ قَالَ «نَعَمْ وَ إِنْ كَانَ بَيْنَكَ وَ بَيْنَ صَاحِبِكَ اَلْيَمُّ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1058 - Abu Basir said to him:
"I hear someone sneeze, and I praise Allah (swt) and send blessings upon the Prophet (sw) while I am in prayer."
Imam (as) said: "Yes, even if there is a sea between you and your companion."
